hard.q: In what year was Beethoven's Ninth Symphony premiered?
Which Bach composition uses the names B-A-C-H as a musical motif in the final fugue?
hard.a: The Art of Fugue (Die Kunst der Fuge)

hard.q: Who composed the opera 'Wozzeck', premiered in Berlin in 1925?
What is the opus number of Beethoven's 'Moonlight Sonata'?
How many variations make up Bach's 'Goldberg Variations' (BWV 988)?
How many movements does Schubert's 'Unfinished' Symphony contain, and why is it famous for that?
hard.a: Two movements (Schubert left it incomplete, never adding the expected third and fourth)

hard.q: Who composed the 'Concerto for Orchestra', premiered by the Boston Symphony in 1944?
In which Hungarian city was Franz Liszt born?
hard.a: Raiding (now in Austria, then part of Hungary)

hard.a: D–E-flat–C–B (his initials in German solfège: D. Sch.)

hard.a: Il cimento dell'armonia e dell'inventione (The Contest Between Harmony and Invention)
